hero.title: Study Timer
hero.description: Focus study sessions using Pomodoro-style timers.

differences.title: Give study time a clear rhythm
differences.description: Study Timer uses Pomodoro-style sessions to separate focused work from planned breaks.

items.title: Timed focus
items.description: Study within a defined focus session.

items.title: Planned breaks
items.description: Separate focused work with clear break periods.

items.title: Repeatable rhythm
items.description: Continue the focus-and-break cycle as needed.

feel.title: A manageable structure for focused study
feel.description: The timer keeps attention on the current session and its planned break.

items.title: Set the timer
items.description: Choose the focus session to begin.

items.title: Study with focus
items.description: Work on the current task until the session ends.

items.title: Take the break
items.description: Pause before beginning another focus session.

audiences.title: Who uses Study Timer
audiences.description: Useful for learners who want structured focus sessions.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Use timed sessions for skill development.

resourceSection.title: Focus-session essentials
resourceSection.description: Keep timed study and planned breaks connected.

items.title: Study block
items.description: Work on one learning task during the timer.

groupedSection.title: A Pomodoro-style study cycle
groupedSection.description: Alternate focused study with planned breaks.

technicalSection.title: Designed for Pomodoro-style study
technicalSection.description: Study Timer follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.

finalCta.title: Explore structured study sessions
finalCta.description: Visit Study Timer to review its planned Pomodoro-style experience.
